items.headline: Wind Advisory issued April 26 at 2:18PM AKDT until April 28 at 2:00AM AKDT by NWS Anchorage AK
items.description:
* WHAT...Southeast winds 40 mph with gusts of 55 mph to 65 mph
expected.

* WHERE...Anchorage Hillside / Eagle River.

* WHEN...From noon Monday to 2 AM AKDT Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects and a few
power outages may result.
items.instruction:
Winds this strong can make driving difficult, especially for high
profile vehicles. Use extra caution.

Secure outdoor objects.

* WHERE...Northern Denali Borough.

items.instruction:
Winds this strong can make driving difficult, especially for high
profile vehicles. Use extra caution.

items.headline: Wind Advisory issued April 26 at 2:00PM AKDT until April 28 at 10:00PM AKDT by NWS Fairbanks AK
items.description:
* WHAT...Southeast winds 20 to 30 mph with gusts up to 50 mph
expected.

* WHERE...Delta Junction.

* WHEN...From 4 PM Monday to 10 PM AKDT Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects.
items.instruction:
Winds this strong can make driving difficult, especially for high

items.headline: High Wind Warning issued April 26 at 1:56AM AKDT until April 26 at 4:00PM AKDT by NWS Anchorage AK
items.description:
* WHAT...Southwest winds 45 to 60 mph, with gusts up to 80 mph
expected.

* WHERE...Atka and Adak.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT this afternoon.

* IMPACTS...High winds may move loose debris, damage property, and
cause power outages. Travel will be difficult.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Westerly winds will gust up to 70-80 mph later
this morning, then slowly decrease through the afternoon and
evening.
items.instruction:
People are urged to secure loose objects that could be blown around
or damaged by the wind. Prepare for the possibility of power outages.

items.headline: Wind Advisory issued April 26 at 1:56AM AKDT until April 26 at 4:00PM AKDT by NWS Anchorage AK
items.description:
* WHAT...South winds 35 to 45 mph, with gusts up to 60 to 75 mph
expected.

* WHERE...Unalaska and Nikolski.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT this afternoon.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects and a few
power outages may result.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Strong southerly winds will continue through
Sunday morning. For Unalaska, gusts of up to 65 mph are expected.
For Nikolski, gusts of up to 75 mph are expected. Winds will slowly
decrease this afternoon and evening.
items.instruction:
People are urged to secure loose objects that could be blown around
or damaged by the wind. Use caution if traveling.
